fair idea. Usually the person with a humble beginning has
long dasa which comes very early his career.
2.Secondly the tenth lord of the celebrity will be very
strong from many angles. This is a simple thumb rule
applied for celebrities. See from lagna chandra lagna and
karkamsha lagna. At least from two lagna the tenth lord
must be extremely strong.
CASE STUDY-1
